name: Centre for Visual Information Technology
description: Research in computer vision, image processing, and visual data analysis. Known for work in scene understanding, video analytics, and document analysis.

name: Language Technologies Research Centre
description: Research in natural language processing, computational linguistics, and speech processing for Indian languages.

name: Centre for Security Theory and Algorithmic Research
description: Research in theoretical computer science, cryptography, algorithms, and formal methods.

name: Robotics Research Center
description: Research in autonomous robots, manipulation, perception, and human-robot interaction.

name: Signal Processing and Communications Research Centre
description: Research in signal processing, wireless communications, and information theory.

name: Center for Computational Natural Sciences and Bioinformatics
description: Interdisciplinary research at the intersection of computation, natural sciences, and biology.
